client_id.description: Box OAuth2 client-credentials client_id. Used only for the token exchange; never logged.

client_secret.description: Box OAuth2 client-credentials client_secret. Used only for the token exchange; never logged.

base_url.description: Box API base URL override for tests or proxies.

token_url.description: Box OAuth2 token endpoint override for tests or proxies.

box_subject_type.description: Box token-scoping subject type: 'enterprise' (application service account) or 'user'. Sent as the box_subject_type token-request form param.

box_subject_id.description: Box token-scoping subject id: the enterprise id (box_subject_type=enterprise) or user id (box_subject_type=user). Sent as the box_subject_id token-request form param.

folder_id.description: Box folder id for the folder_items stream (folders/{folder_id}/items); defaults to the root folder (0).

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
